description_long: This doll features a stylized, youthful character with dark skin, large expressive purple eyes, and a playful pastel color palette. The doll wears a white dress with turquoise trim and pink buttons, layered over a pink skirt and accented by mismatched stockings—one pink and one turquoise. Its hair is white with a prominent pink streak, styled into two large buns adorned with blue bows and white, animal-like ear decorations. The back of the head features a sculpted mask or helmet with pink circular accents and blue highlights, giving a whimsical, fantasy-inspired look. The doll's hands are delicately posed, and it wears black shoes with pink and turquoise details, completing its unique, eye-catching appearance.
description: A stylized doll with dark skin, pastel-colored hair in buns, a white dress with turquoise and pink accents, and whimsical animal-like head decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, pastel hair, white dress with turquoise trim, and mismatched stockings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted mask or helmet with pink circles and blue accents, and the doll's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with the full mask/helmet, blue bows, and the flared dress.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the mask/helmet, the doll's arm position, and the layered dress.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a short-sleeved, white A-line dress with turquoise trim and three large pink buttons, layered over a pink skirt. The outfit is paired with mismatched stockings—one pink, one turquoise—and black shoes with pink and turquoise accents. The style is whimsical and pastel, reminiscent of Harajuku street fashion with fantasy influences.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head slightly tilted, left arm bent and raised, right arm bent at the elbow, and both hands delicately posed. The left leg is forward, and the right leg is slightly back, giving a dynamic, mid-step appearance.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral, slightly inquisitive facial expression with large, wide-open purple eyes, relaxed eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, white hair styled into two large buns with a prominent pink streak on the left side, adorned with blue bows and white animal-like ear decorations.
